problems.name: Early Blight

solution.organic: Neem oil ya Garlic-Chilli spray (7 din mein 2 baar)
solution.chemical: Mancozeb ya Copper Oxychloride fungicide (as per label dose)
solution.water: Paani kam karo, leaves ko dry rakhna zaroori hai
solution.other: Affected leaves turant nikaal do aur jala do, khet ke bahar phenko

problems.prevention: Subah paani do (evening avoid karo), faslon ke beech proper distance rakho, crop rotation follow karo

problems.name: Late Blight

solution.chemical: Metalaxyl + Mancozeb combination spray, 7-10 din mein
solution.water: Overhead irrigation avoid karo, drip irrigation better hai
solution.other: Severely affected plants ko turant hata do, yeh bahut fast phailta hai

problems.prevention: Humid weather mein extra alert raho, proper spacing rakho

problems.name: Leaf Spot / Bacterial Spot

solution.water: Paani upar se mat do, drip irrigation best hai

problems.prevention: Seed treatment karo lagane se pehle, saaf beej use karo

problems.name: Powdery Mildew

solution.organic: Milk spray (1:9 water ratio) ya Neem oil
solution.water: Normal watering theek hai, sirf overhead spray avoid karo

problems.prevention: Achhi sunlight aur air circulation rakho, overcrowding avoid karo

solution.organic: Vermicompost ya cow dung manure daalo
solution.other: Overwatering check karo, root rot bhi wajah ho sakta hai

problems.name: Wilting / Murjhana

solution.if_normal_moisture: Root fungal infection ho sakta hai, Carbendazim soil drench karo

problems.prevention: Overwatering aur underwatering dono avoid karo

problems.name: Aphids / Chepa Attack

solution.organic: Neem oil + soap water spray har 3-4 din mein
solution.other: Ladybugs jaise natural predators encourage karo

problems.prevention: Regular field inspection karo, early detection zaroori hai

problems.name: Stem Borer

solution.other: Affected tillers ko cut karke nikaal do

problems.prevention: Resistant variety choose karo, timely sowing karo

problems.name: Root Rot

solution.water: Drainage improve karo, overwatering turant band karo

problems.prevention: Waterlogging avoid karo, raised beds use karo

solution.action: Shaam ke time 10-15 minute irrigation karo
solution.note: Agar kal baarish ka forecast hai toh irrigation postpone karo

solution.action: Drainage channel banao, turant irrigation band karo
solution.note: Waterlogging se root rot aur fungal disease ka risk badh jaata hai

solution.action: Extra irrigation shaam ya subah ke time do
solution.other: Mulching karo taaki soil temperature control ho
solution.note: Peak afternoon mein spray/fertilizer avoid karo

problems.name: Fruit Rot
problems.prevention: Proper spacing aur air circulation rakho

problems.name: Rice Blast
problems.prevention: Resistant variety use karo, balanced fertilizer

solution.other: Timely sowing se risk kam hota hai

solution.action: Soil test karwao agar possible ho
solution.general: Balanced NPK fertilizer use karo (ratio crop ke hisab se)

solution.organic: Neem oil spray first line of defense
solution.chemical: Broad spectrum insecticide agar organic kaam na kare
solution.other: Pest ka photo lekar exact identification karo pehle

solution.tip: Regular monitoring jaari rakho, preventive neem spray har 10-15 din mein kar sakte ho

fallback.message: Iska exact match knowledge base mein nahi mila. Gemini AI se personalized response generate kiya ja raha hai.
